calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Vitaliy Gofman, Judgment Debtor
No appearances made by Plantiff.

HEARING ON PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. RULING AFTER HEARING: The court orders that $1, 242.90 already seized by the Sheriffs through wage garnishment be turned over to the judgment creditor and that future garnishment proceed at the rate of $125 per 2 weeks pay period. JUDGE WALLACE P. DOUGLASS NOT REPORTED.
